overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for BA (Hons) at St. Joseph University Dimapur?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BA (Hons) at St. Joseph University Dimapur is INR 1.2 lakh. Aspirants who are shortlisted for admission have to confirm their seat by paying the admission and tuition fee. Candidates have to pay the fee via the mode specified by the university.

review_summary.college_name: St. Joseph University Dimapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Pursuing economics major in St. Joseph University.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. The highest package was around 7 LPA and the lowest was around 3.50 LPA. 3. Top recruiting companies were mostly financial institutions. Around 70% of students got placed in financial sectors like Axis Bank.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available with the latest technologies in every classrooms, labs, and a huge library with all the important books for you. There was a separate hostel for both boys and girls on the campus with all the sports and canteen facilities and also healthcare. They also provided bus services for the students and also the teachers even for hostel picnics and other events.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Above average according to me.

content.Placements: There are 61 students in our class. Banking and business are the jobs related to my course. I don't know much about internships, and the top roles offered in my course will be in business. I would recommend others to join as it provides opportunities for various jobs and prepares the students for the future.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding the infrastructure, it's quite good. They provide everything that a student needs. We can solve our doubts and find answers in the library by going through the books provided there. They also offer a digital library, which is quite amazing. The lab facilities are also impressive. In regard to the hostel, the facilities are good except for the food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life in St. Joseph University.

content.Placements: Minimum 70% of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is Rs. 80K to 1 Lakh, the lowest package offered is Rs. 30K to Rs. 50K, and the average package is Rs. 50K to Rs. 80K. Till now, we don't have top recruiting companies for our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at St. Joseph University is satisfactory and well-maintained. All kinds of necessary facilities are available for the students. The quality of facilities in our hostel is acceptable. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good and hygienic. All kinds of medical, sports, and games facilities are available at our university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with teachers of St. Joseph University.

content.Placements: Only 10% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was INR 2.4 LPA, while the lowest was INR 1.4 LPA, and the average package was around INR 1.8 LPA. About 50% of the students secured internships, and the internship experience is considered quite good.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are adequate and well-maintained for my department. The labs are in good condition, classrooms are well-equipped, and the library has a vast collection of books. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The quality of food in the canteen is decent, and the sports facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about the college.

content.Placements: As of now, I'm currently in my 5th semester, final year of B.Sc., and we haven't received any information on placements. We have no idea what types of placements are offered, and there hasn't been a time where we had the chance to sit for placements. Maybe we might get offers this semester or in the next, but as of now, there is none.
content.Infrastructure: As for the facilities and infrastructure in my department, everything is quite acceptable and fine. The only problem is the electricity, which is unstable in the state. The labs are okay, the library is quite good, and Wi-Fi is available for free in the library. I have no idea about the facilities in the hostel, as I am a regular student and haven't been there at all.

admission_overview.college_name: St. Joseph University Dimapur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: St. Joseph University Dimapur Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: St. Joseph University Dimapur admissions are primarily merit-based. The university considers qualifying exam scores of the candidates for selection. The university may conduct or accept entrance exam scores for PhD programmes. St. Joseph University Dimapur offers courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Arts, Science, Management, etc. Candidates can apply for any of the offered courses online on the university's website.

eligibility_selection.title: St. Joseph University Dimapur Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: St. Joseph University Dimapur shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit. Aspirants must meet the eligibility criteria to apply for the preferred course. The basic qualification required for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popular St. Joseph University Dimapur courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or HSSLC from state board or CBSE of equivalent examinations with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as core subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)
Any undergraduate degree from a recognised university with at least 40% aggregate
Class 12 with relevant subjects with at least 40% aggregate

faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed BCA/ BSc Computer Science/ BSc Information Technology/ BSc Mathematics, BSc Physics, BSc Chemisry with a minimum of 40% aggregate can apply for the MCA programme at St. Joseph University Dimapur. Aspirants must have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at St. Joseph University?

admission_process.title: St. Joseph University Dimapur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: St. Joseph University admissionis merit-based. Candidates are first required to fill out the application form for the preferred course to participate in the selection process. Aspirants fulfilling the eligibility criteria are granted admission in the university. Below are the steps to get a seat at St. Joseph University Dimapur:
STEP 1: St. Joseph University Dimapur Application Process 2025

Aspirants can fill out the form online. Candidates are first required to register to generate login credentials and then fill out the application form. Aspirants have to pay INR 400 as the application fee.
STEP 2: Selection
Once the aspirants submit the application form, the university then reviews their details. The university confirms the eligibility of the candidates.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Candidates also need to send the specified documents to the official email id of the university. All the documents must be sent in single mail only. Once the documents are verified, aspirants are then called for a preliminary interview via phone by the online admission desk. Aspirants must then pay theSt. Joseph University Dimapur feeto confirm their seat. Candidates must send the e-receipt of the same to the official mail id. The university after verification of the receipt confirms the admission by sending provisional e-admit card to the candidate's registered email-id. Below are the documents required:
lists: Scanned copy of HSSLC/ Class 12 marksheet
Online application in PDF fom, obtained from stage I process
Application fee e-receipt (paid during stage I process)
Mobile No. (provided in the admission portal)
Scanned copy of pass and Tansfer Certificate
Scanned copy of SSLC/ Class 10 Certificate
Scanned copy of UG marksheet, UG Provisional/ Degree Certificate (for PG Admission)

The university offers BTech inCivil EngineeringandComputer Science & Engineering. The BTech programme is approved by AICTE, New Delhi. The selection for the BTech programme is based on merit of the aspirants. Those who have completed Class 12 with PCM are eligible to apply for the BTech course.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech at St. Joseph University Dimapur?
faqs.answer: St. Joseph University Dimapur has a total of120 seatsavailable in the BTech programme. The university offers seats in BTech based on the merit of the aspirants. Those who are selected based on their qualifying exam scores have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management courses stands around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management is approximately INR 100800 - INR 244800.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management has course specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management?

reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges in India so placements are very good with high packages.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placements in 3 years here companies visiting here were JBM, FCC, Bajaj moters, and many others which give offers to every single person eligible. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges from 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Around 100% of students were placed to get a business or get a job in a good company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The room was well-equipped with fans, beds, tables, chairs, washroom, bulbs, basin, and all other daily needs. The meal quality was excellent and students can get a variety of food here. Hostel registration was done on the campus itself and every common students can afford it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is good college and gives assured placements, students can take admission in it.

review_content.Placements: Placements were very good. Many companies come for placements. The previous year my senior got a package of 3 LPA. It was very good package for a diploma student. Many famous companies come for providing jobs. The top recruiting companies were Bajaj Motors, Motherson, Jai Bharat Maruti, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides Wi-Fi, big ground, best canteen, a perfect library, workshop, and laboratories were very good. Good quality of hostel was there. The classrooms were fully furnished and maintained. The campus was fully centralized air-conditioner and Wi-Fi connectivity was very strong. The food was healthy and hygienic as well.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: The BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focuses on both theoretical lectures as well as practical work.With the help of lectures in the curriculum, theoretical concepts are introduced to students, tutorials provide space for solving problems and applications also.And the labs offer hands-on experience to students who get acquainted with equipment and CAD software. Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.
faqs.question: Q: Does BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

overview_faqs.answer: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management is a renowned institution offering MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies, Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management boasts an impressive review rating of 4.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 5 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 5 for Faculty, and 5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in India so placements are very good with high packages.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placements in 3 years here companies visiting here were JBM, FCC, Bajaj moters, and many others which give offers to every single person eligible. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges from 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Around 100% of students were placed to get a business or get a job in a good company.
content.Infrastructure: The room was well-equipped with fans, beds, tables, chairs, washroom, bulbs, basin, and all other daily needs. The meal quality was excellent and students can get a variety of food here. Hostel registration was done on the campus itself and every common students can afford it.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is good college and gives assured placements, students can take admission in it.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Many companies come for placements. The previous year my senior got a package of 3 LPA. It was very good package for a diploma student. Many famous companies come for providing jobs. The top recruiting companies were Bajaj Motors, Motherson, Jai Bharat Maruti, etc.
content.Infrastructure: It provides Wi-Fi, big ground, best canteen, a perfect library, workshop, and laboratories were very good. Good quality of hostel was there. The classrooms were fully furnished and maintained. The campus was fully centralized air-conditioner and Wi-Fi connectivity was very strong. The food was healthy and hygienic as well.

admission_overview.college_name: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Aryavart Institute of Technology and Managementoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

courses_data.name: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Management After 10th Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Aryavart Institute of Technology and Managementoffers After 10th Diploma for 3 years at the After 10th level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in After 10th Diploma based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers After 10th Diploma in specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 1,00,800.
